headline: How The FactSet (FDS) Story Is Shifting With New AI Risks And Cautious Targets
summary: FactSet Research Systems has seen its fair value estimate trimmed slightly to US$252.44 from US$253.31, a reduction of about 0.3%, as analysts fine tune their models. This small adjustment sits against a backdrop of more cautious Street research, with some firms cutting targets more sharply and raising concerns around AI, competition, and the potential for a valuation reset, even as others still highlight pricing and competitive wins as positives. As you read on, you will see how to track...
